General.Name: Kin Shing Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Kin Shing Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in erecting formworks for construction works in private residential and commercial buildings in Hong Kong. It provides timber formworks by using timber and plywood; and metal formwork system by using aluminium and other metals. The company also engages in building construction works, and securities investment business. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong. Kin Shing Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Five Continental Enterprise Limited.
General.Address: Billion Plaza 2, Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong
